text_path="/mnt/data/file-77d2zLARg71vt333RQm3Ci-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(text_path,"r",encoding="utf-8") as f:
    s=f.read()
s[:1000], len(s)

import re
text=s
candidates = []
# pattern for quoted Arabic phrases
for span in re.finditer(r'“([^”]+)”', s):
    candidates.append((span.start(), span.group(1)))
for span in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', s):
    candidates.append((span.start(), span.group(1)))
candidates[:5], len(candidates)

spans=[]
for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', s):
    content=m.group(1)
    start_quote=m.start()
    start = start_quote+1
    end = start + len(content)
    # classify
    typ=None
    if content.startswith("وَمَنْ أَصْدَقُ") or content.startswith("إِنَّ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا"):
        typ="Ayah"
    if content.startswith("المؤمن من") or content.startswith("المؤمن الذي"):
        typ="Hadith"
    spans.append((start,end,content,typ))
spans
